title: Smoky Slovakian Lentils Bake
description: A hearty, lowfat Slovakian lentil bake infused with Thai green curry paste and smoky paprika, perfect for a cozy date night.
instructions: Rinse the lentils under cold water and drain.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the diced onion and carrot and sauté for 5 minutes until they begin to soften. Add the minced garlic and cook for another 1 minute.
Stir in the Thai green curry paste and smoked paprika, cooking for 1 minute to release the flavors.

Add the lentils, low‑sodium vegetable broth, and low‑fat tomato sauce to the skillet. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the lentil mixture to a greased 9‑inch baking dish. Spread the low‑fat Greek yogurt evenly over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30–35 minutes, or until the liquid has thickened and the lentils are tender.
Remove from the oven and let the bake rest for 5 minutes. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro or parsley before serving.
